message: I've been slowly building up my emergency kit over the past few months, and honestly it feels good to have the basics covered without stressing about it. I found this resource super helpful for figuring out what actually makes sense to keep on hand—nothing dramatic, just practical stuff you'd genuinely want if the power went out or you couldn't leave home for a few days. What's one item you already have at home that you'd definitely want to grab in a pinch?
